
### register renaming 


* rename <i>architectural registers</i> to <i>physical registers</i> 

   * architectural = part of instruction set architecture

* different name for each version of architectural register


### register renaming state 

<!-- \lstset{language=myasm,style=small} -->
   

::: {.r-stack}
![](/ooo/texfig/rrState.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/rrState.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/rrState.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}


:::


### register renaming example (1) 

<!-- \lstset{language=myasm,style=small} -->
   ![](/ooo/texfig/rrExample1.figure.svg)


### register renaming example (2) 

<!-- \lstset{language=myasm,style=small} -->
   

::: {.r-stack}
![](/ooo/texfig/rrExample2.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/ooo/texfig/rrExample2.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/ooo/texfig/rrExample2.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/ooo/texfig/rrExample2.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::
